title: Senior Doctor - Johnson & Johnson India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Johnson & Johnson India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Johnson & Johnson India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Johnson & Johnson India:
Johnson & Johnson India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Johnson & Johnson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
